{{Quote|Deefour? Erratic but functional.|Cai|<ref name="Hammertong: The Tale of the Tonnika Sisters">{{StoryCite|story=Hammertong: The Tale of the "Tonnika Sisters"|book=Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina}}</ref>}}
'''D4''', also called '''Deefour''', was the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] used by the [[Mistryl Shadow Guard]] warrior-woman [[Cai]] aboard the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Mirage (starship)|''Mirage'']].

==Biography==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Deefour assisted Cai, [[Shada D'ukal]], and [[Karoly D'ulin]] in trying to get a module of the [[Hammertong/Legends|Hammertong]] back to [[Emberlene]]. The droid was stolen, however, by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] operative [[Riij Winward]], who was determined that his Alliance superiors should receive the technical readouts of the superlaser prototype which Deefour was carrying.

The young Rebel nevertheless promised to leave him for collection with a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] freight operation on [[Piroket/Legends|Piroket]], if the Mistryl returned the Alliance freighter they had stolen.
